nature_language:
We are 4 people traveling from Shenzhen to Shanghai for 3 days, and we need to meet at least one of the following conditions:  
1. Do not want to try the following types of restaurants: Snacks, Bar/Pub, and Fujian cuisine.  
2. Prefer accommodation within 6.4 km of the Shanghai Soong Ching Ling Former Residence Memorial Hall.
